source_pr.title: executor: fix AnalyzeStatus unit test data race
source_pr.body:

symptoms: PR title: fix AnalyzeStatus unit test data race.
failure_signature: PR title: fix AnalyzeStatus unit test data race.
root_cause_explanation: Analyze job state/timestamps were updated without consistently holding the job mutex, which could lead to data races when jobs are read/sorted concurrently (e.g., in AnalyzeStatus-related tests). This PR expands locking to cover updates to job fields (including moving time.Now() inside the lock), eliminating the data race.
fix_pattern: Ensure AnalyzeJob fields (state/updateTime) are read/updated under the job mutex; avoid calling time.Now() and mutating job state outside the lock.

evidence: evidence: PR title: fix AnalyzeStatus unit test data race.
evidence: diff expands locking to cover updates to AnalyzeJob state/timestamps (e.g., lock before setting job.updateTime/State; move time.Now inside job mutex) (statistics/analyze_jobs.go).
